metadata.scopeNote: Officer-involved fatal shootings are excluded from the main tracker. Arrest reported is a public-source proxy, not an official clearance determination.
metadata.q1ReconciliationNote: Published OPD/news count reports indicate 14 homicides through March 31, while the current coded tracker has 13 victims through that date. One pre-February-22 case or classification mismatch remains unresolved.

victims.name: Edward Williams
victims.circumstancesSummary: Public reports say Edward Williams was fatally shot late on New Year's morning near East 20th Street and 27th Avenue. KTVU later reported Brian Spikes Hopkins was arrested and charged with murder in the case.

victims.name: Tariq Roddy Figueroa
victims.circumstancesSummary: Tariq Roddy Figueroa was fatally shot at or near a North Oakland barbershop on Market Street on New Year's Day. Initial reports said Wesley Broach was arrested; a later secondary report said Broach was released without charges after self-defense evidence surfaced, which still needs primary confirmation.

victims.name: Luis Valdez-Gomez
victims.location: 8400 block of International Boulevard / Sky Market
victims.circumstancesSummary: Three men were killed in an early-morning shooting at Sky Market on International Boulevard near 85th Avenue. Later reporting described the case as involving a dispute around a small marijuana purchase and identified Darrell Tatmon as charged with three counts of murder.

victims.name: Kevin Andrew Valdez-Gomez
victims.location: 8400 block of International Boulevard / Sky Market
victims.circumstancesSummary: Three men were killed in an early-morning shooting at Sky Market on International Boulevard near 85th Avenue. Later reporting described the case as involving a dispute around a small marijuana purchase and identified Darrell Tatmon as charged with three counts of murder.

victims.name: Miguel Ramirez
victims.location: 8400 block of International Boulevard / Sky Market
victims.circumstancesSummary: Three men were killed in an early-morning shooting at Sky Market on International Boulevard near 85th Avenue. Later reporting described the case as involving a dispute around a small marijuana purchase and identified Darrell Tatmon as charged with three counts of murder.

victims.name: unknown
victims.circumstancesSummary: A person was fatally shot around midday near the Oakland Flea Market on Coliseum Way. Initial reports said no victim identity or suspect information had been released.

victims.name: Jason Schweizer
victims.location: 1500 block of Jackson Street / near 15th and Jackson
victims.circumstancesSummary: Jason Schweizer was found dead near 15th and Jackson streets with lacerations or stab wounds. KTVU reported that no suspect had been identified as of January 20.

victims.name: unknown
victims.circumstancesSummary: A man was fatally shot in the 300 block of Grand Avenue on the morning of January 17. Initial reports withheld the victim's name and did not identify an arrest.

victims.name: unknown
victims.location: 9700 block of San Leandro Street / later 1700 block of 37th Avenue
victims.circumstancesSummary: Human remains were found February 1 on San Leandro Street and later-linked remains were found February 16 on 37th Avenue. OPD later said the remains belonged to the same person, so the tracker treats this as one victim pending identification and further official detail.

victims.name: unknown
victims.circumstancesSummary: A person was found dead with severe head trauma in the 2300 block of San Pablo Avenue on February 2. Bay City News reported that a suspect was located and detained nearby, but the victim and suspect names were not released in the initial public reports.

victims.name: unknown
victims.circumstancesSummary: A 35-year-old man was fatally shot in the 3000 block of San Pablo Avenue in Hoover-Foster on March 1. The Chronicle reported that police had not announced any arrests as of March 3.

victims.name: Latetia Bobo
victims.circumstancesSummary: Latetia Bobo and Markise Martin were killed and five other people were injured in a mass shooting at EZ's Lounge in downtown Oakland. Police initially detained several people and recovered guns, but public reports said no arrests had been announced as of March 9.

victims.name: Markise Martin
victims.circumstancesSummary: Latetia Bobo and Markise Martin were killed and five other people were injured in a mass shooting at EZ's Lounge in downtown Oakland. Police initially detained several people and recovered guns, but public reports said no arrests had been announced as of March 9.

victims.name: Derrick Hubbard
victims.location: 6400 block of Foothill Boulevard / 2800 block of 64th Avenue
victims.circumstancesSummary: Derrick Hubbard and Isaanae Morton were killed in an East Oakland triple shooting near Foothill Boulevard and 64th Avenue; a third person survived in critical condition. Initial public reports did not identify an arrest.

victims.name: Isaanae Morton
victims.location: 6400 block of Foothill Boulevard / 2800 block of 64th Avenue
victims.circumstancesSummary: Derrick Hubbard and Isaanae Morton were killed in an East Oakland triple shooting near Foothill Boulevard and 64th Avenue; a third person survived in critical condition. Initial public reports did not identify an arrest.

victims.name: unknown
victims.location: Wood and 18th streets near Raimondi Park / 1800 block of Wood Street
victims.circumstancesSummary: A man was fatally shot near Wood and 18th streets by Raimondi Park on April 23. The Alameda County District Attorney and Chronicle reported Tyrone Gobar was charged with murder and firearm-related counts.
